dateline: Tampa, Florida — Night 2 of ARIRANG World Tour on Day 4,700 Since Debut; 31 Shows / 12 Cities Confirmed
heroHeadline: Day 4,700: BTS Performs Night 2 in Tampa as ARIRANG North America Tour Confirms 31 Shows Across 12 Cities
heroSubtitle: Exactly 4,700 days since their June 13, 2013 debut, BTS performs the second of three sold-out nights at Raymond James Stadium in Tampa, Florida on April 26, 2026. Coverage published today by Korea Herald, Korea Times, STARNEWS Korea, and International Business Times confirms the full ARIRANG World Tour North America scope: 31 concerts across 12 cities including El Paso, Mexico City, and New York, with additional shows added in Tampa, Stanford (CA), and Las Vegas due to demand. Tampa's projected economic impact reaches $800M–$900M. Simultaneously, 'SWIM' climbs to a new peak of No. 13 on Billboard's Pop Radio Airplay chart — the highest ever by a Korean act — while holding No. 1 on the Global 200 for a fourth consecutive week.
footerNote: Data sourced from HYBE, Billboard, Hanteo Chart, Gaon Chart, Melon, Spotify, Netflix, Guinness World Records, IFPI, Korea Times, Korea Herald, Yonhap, Bloomberg, Variety, AP News, UPI, Starnews Korea, Rolling Stone, PBS NewsHour, Euronews, City of Tampa, Business Observer Florida, WTSP Tampa Bay, FOX 13 Tampa Bay, Tampa Bay Times, Bay News 9, ArtThreat, Soompi, IBTimes AU, and Recording Academy.
